title: hieracium murorum subsp. sarissatum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. sarissatum, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting wound healing. Hieracium murorum subsp. sarissatum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, and can be consumed raw in small amounts under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
